title: Fine Manners
writer: James Ashmore Creelman, J. Clarkson Miller, Frank Vreiland
actors: Gloria Swanson, Eugene O'Brien, Helen Dunbar
plot: In a run down New York Tenament, a chorine named Orchid lives with her overprotective brother Buddy, who sees to it that no uptown Casanovas get a chance at seducing his sister. At a New Year's Eve party the two are separated in t...
